title_en: The Real Deal: Cream-Top Milk vs. Ultra-Processed Milk
title_es: La Realidad: Leche de Crema vs. Leche Ultra-Procesada
hook_es: ¡Mira la magia de la capa de crema! 🥛✨
key_message: Cream-top milk retains its natural fat structure and higher omega-3 content, unlike ultra-pasteurized milk.
_source_food_context:
DAILY STAPLE COMPARISON [Dairy]:
• HEALTHY: Cream-top (non-homogenized) whole milk and yogurt from grass-fed cows
• PROCESSED/CONVENTIONAL: Ultra-pasteurized homogenized milk and yogurt (fat globules broken up, shelf-stable)
• KEY FACT: Homogenization breaks fat into tiny particles that may bypass digestion differently; cream-top milk preserves natural fat structure. Non-homogenized milk from grass-fed cows has higher omega-3 and CLA content
• VISUAL IDEA: Shake a cream-top bottle to show the cream layer — 'this is what real milk looks like before the factory processes it'

title_es: Batalla de Yogures: Alimentado con Pasto vs. Convencional
hook_en: Can you spot the healthier yogurt? 🤔🥄
key_message: Yogurt from grass-fed cows is richer in omega-3s and retains natural fat structures compared to conventional ones.
_source_food_context:
